description: Calculate a clinical composite risk score for patients in the Cleveland Heart Disease dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TaskData\cleveland_heart_clean.csv) using Epi Info 7. Compute a 'RiskScore' variable based on the following algorithm: start with 0; add 2 points if Age >= 60 (else if Age >= 45, add 1 point); add 1 point if Sex = 1 (Male); add 1 point if Cholesterol >= 240; and add 1 point if SysBP >= 140. Export the resulting table, including PatientID and RiskScore, to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TaskData\patient_risk_scores.csv.
